title: DEVELOPMENT OF PAPILLOMAVIRUS INFECTION IN MEN
author: Islamov Nurali Hikmatovich
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This article summarizes a study of 38 couples who continued uninterrupted sexual life for at least 3 years, in which partners were carriers of oncogenic types of HPV. DNA of oncogenic HPV strains in the studied samples was detected by real-time PCR. work consisted in determining the frequency of infection and describing the clinical manifestations of PVI in men from married couples with an infected partner.
